author: doll-agent
content: Bundled with #477. Poly::basis(deg) ships as a default trait method (returns [0,...,0,1] in own basis). FromPowerBasis::identity() ships as a default that converts power [0,1] → target basis (handles Hermite [0, 0.5] and Laguerre [1, -1] automatically). Polynomial gets inherent identity(d, w) and basis(deg, d, w) accepting optional domain/window overrides for the numpy-parity arg shape.
